title: Network Evidence, Safety, and Troubleshooting Method · Operations Brief: Net Incident Documentation
summary: Operate a safe virtual help-desk lab with tickets, diagrams, baselines, commands, packet evidence, and change records. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net incident documentation increment in a reproducible network evidence notebook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Record timeline, environment, commands, findings, actions, outcomes, lessons, and evidence without exposing secrets.
Verify the original task plus retained services and identify a preventive control after a bounded repair.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
